title: AE2 + Mouse Tweaks Fix
description: Disables Mouse Tweaks' "WheelTweak" in AE2 terminals
body:
This simple mod disables Mouse Tweaks' "WheelTweak" feature in AE2 ME Terminals. This prevents items from accidentally being moved via mouse scrolling when trying to scroll within a terminal.

The mod has been tested on 1.18.2, 1.19.2, and 1.20.1, and likely also works on versions above and below those.
